{{Quote|I'm more than skilled enough to work for the Exchange.|False Batu Rem|<ref name="KOTOR2" />}}
'''This [[Human/Legends|Human]] male''' was a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] working for the [[Exchange]] in the aftermath of the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
Hoping to capitalize on the bounty that the [[Exchange]] had posted on [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], he assumed the identity of [[Batu Rem]], an officer on leave from the [[Telos Security Force]]. He confronted [[Meetra Surik]] and her two companions, [[Kreia]] and [[Atton Rand]], soon after their arrival on [[Citadel Station]] and their subsequent detainment by the TSF for their connection with the destruction of the [[Peragus Mining Facility]].

Rem's impersonator planned to turn off the surveillance cameras and electrocute the three where they stood in their [[force cage]]s. After taunting from Rand, however, he released them from their cages and attempted to fight them himself. He was no match for the trio and was killed during the skirmish.

At the request of TSF [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Dol Grenn]], Surik later [[Skirmishes on Citadel Station|investigated]] the impostor's origins. She discovered that he had arrived on [[Telos IV|Telos]] from [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], the ship he had taken landing in [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation's]] private hangar.

==Behind the scenes==
Originally, the false Batu was working for the [[GenoHaradan]], not the Exchange.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
